card_description: St. Sophia (Greek: "Wisdom") is a divine or mythological figure appearing in Philip K. Dick's Exegesis. In the gnostic tradition, St. Sophia is fallen divine aeon whose error created the material world. PKD's theology heavily draws on Sophia as trapped divine wisdom. Appears in 47 Exegesis passages. Context: "Dick identifies the "Holy Spirit" as a collective immortal Light Body that re-entered him to stimulate his "Third Soul" (Aristotelian/immortal)."

reference.brief: Fallen divine aeon whose error created the material world
reference.significance: PKD's theology heavily draws on Sophia as trapped divine wisdom
